questionText: Complete a frase com a forma verbal correta: 'The glacier ___ significantly since the industrial revolution began.'
Escolha a preposição correta: 'The rise ___ sea levels threatens coastal communities worldwide.'
Escolha o artigo correto: 'Scientists warn that ___ Amazon rainforest is approaching a tipping point.'
Complete com a forma correta do verbo modal: 'We ___ reduce carbon emissions if we want to avoid the worst effects of climate change.'
Selecione a conjunção correta: 'Renewable energy is growing rapidly, ___ fossil fuels still dominate the global energy mix.'
Escolha o tempo verbal adequado: 'By 2050, scientists predict that many coral reefs ___ due to ocean acidification.'
Complete a frase com a preposição correta: 'The government invested heavily ___ solar energy infrastructure last year.'
Selecione a forma verbal correta na voz passiva: 'Thousands of trees ___ every day in the Amazon basin.'
Complete com o pronome relativo adequado: 'The environmental policy, ___ was drafted last year, has already shown positive results.'
Escolha a forma correta do adjetivo comparativo: 'Wind energy is becoming ___ than coal as a source of electricity generation.'
Indique o verbo correto para completar: 'Deforestation ___ a major threat to biodiversity across tropical regions.'
Selecione a preposição adequada: 'Many species are at risk ___ extinction due to habitat destruction.'
Complete com o modal correto: 'If industries do not curb emissions, temperatures ___ rise by more than 2°C.'
Escolha a forma verbal correta no gerúndio: 'The company committed to ___ its carbon footprint by 30% over the next decade.'
Indique o quantificador correto: 'There is ___ evidence to suggest that microplastics are harmful to marine life.'
Complete com a conjunção correta: 'Solar panels generate clean electricity ___ they require significant upfront investment.'
Selecione a forma verbal adequada: 'Environmentalists have long ___ for stricter regulations on industrial waste disposal.'
Complete a frase com a estrutura correta de condicional: 'Had governments acted sooner, the environmental damage ___ far less severe.'
Escolha a estrutura verbal correta com particípio: '___ by years of drought, the region's agriculture has collapsed entirely.'
Indique a preposição correta: 'The new legislation was passed ___ the objection of several powerful lobbying groups.'
Selecione a forma correta do subjuntivo: 'The committee recommended that every nation ___ binding emissions targets.'
Complete com o conector de causa e efeito mais preciso: 'Ocean temperatures have risen sharply, ___ the bleaching of coral reefs on an unprecedented scale.'
Escolha a forma verbal correta na voz passiva com modal perfeito: 'The endangered wetland ___ years ago if the conservation bill had passed.'
Complete com a estrutura de inversão enfática correta: '___ the environmental movement gained momentum, the government began to take action.'
Indique o uso correto do gerúndio vs. infinitivo: 'The NGO stopped ___ single-use plastics in its operations as part of its green pledge.'
Selecione o determinante correto: '___ deforestation that has occurred in the past century is largely irreversible.'
Complete com a preposição correta na expressão idiomática: 'World leaders are finally coming ___ terms with the urgency of the climate crisis.'
Escolha a forma verbal correta com perfect aspect: 'The data ___ that global average temperatures have increased by 1.2°C since pre-industrial times.'
Identifique a estrutura de cleft sentence correta: '___ the unregulated use of pesticides that has decimated bee populations across Europe.'
Selecione a forma correta de aspect progressivo perfeito: 'For decades, scientists ___ the effects of ozone depletion on polar ecosystems.'
Complete com a preposição correta na colocação verbal: 'The new policy aims to clamp ___ on illegal wildlife trafficking.'
Indique a forma correta do infinitivo perfeito: 'The environmental accord appears ___ the decline in Arctic sea ice.'
Complete a frase nominal complexa: 'The ___ rapidly melting Arctic permafrost releases vast amounts of methane into the atmosphere.'
Selecione o uso correto do adverbio de grau com adjetivo: 'The situation in the Great Barrier Reef is ___ more critical than previously reported.'
Escolha a estrutura gramatical correta na voz passiva causativa: 'The government had the polluted river ___ by a team of environmental engineers.'
Complete com a estrutura de inversão enfática correta: '___ the conference ended did the full extent of the biodiversity crisis become apparent.'
Identifique a forma correta do particípio absoluto: '___ the complexity of the ecosystem fully understood, conservationists devised a targeted restoration plan.',
Selecione a forma modal perfeita que expressa crítica: 'Policymakers ___ implemented a carbon tax far sooner — the delay has cost us dearly.'
Complete com a estrutura nominal correta: 'There is an urgent need for ___ the transition to a fully circular economy.'
Identifique a preposição correta na expressão de proporcionalidade: '___ the pace of glacial melt increases, the risk of catastrophic sea-level rise grows exponentially.'
Escolha a estrutura correta de condicional misto (mixed conditional): 'If the Kyoto Protocol ___ more rigorously enforced, the atmosphere today ___ significantly less polluted.'
Selecione a construção com particípio absoluto gramaticalmente correta: '___, the conservationists proceeded with the rewilding project despite fierce opposition.'
Complete com o uso correto de 'lest': 'Emissions must be curtailed drastically ___ the planet ___ beyond the 1.5°C threshold.'
Indique a estrutura correta de reported speech para a declaração: 'The lead scientist said:
correctAnswer: The lead scientist said that the damage to the ozone layer might never be fully repaired.
options: The lead scientist said that the damage to the ozone layer might never be fully repaired.
The lead scientist said that the damage to the ozone layer may never be fully repaired.
The lead scientist told that the damage to the ozone layer might never fully repaired.
The lead scientist said the damage to the ozone layer will never have been fully repaired.

questionText: Selecione a colocação verbal mais precisa e idiomática: 'The industrial discharge ___ havoc on the river's fragile ecosystem.'
Complete a frase com a estrutura nominal correta após 'proposal': 'The summit endorsed a proposal ___ the international trade of endangered species.'
Identifique a forma correta do subjuntivo na oração subordinada: 'It is imperative that each signatory nation ___ its nationally determined contributions annually.'
Selecione a estrutura de ênfase por inversão gramaticalmente correta: '___ rarely ___ scientists witnessed such a rapid collapse of an entire biome.'
Complete com a forma nominal deverbal mais adequada: 'The ___ of methane from thawing permafrost represents a major feedback loop in climate change.'
Identifique a estrutura de condicional com inversão gramaticalmente correta: '___ the nations to ratify the agreement, global emissions would fall by an estimated 40%.'
